query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750005, 'Which school of interpretation favored allegorical interpretation in the early church?', 'multiple_choice', '["Antiochene school","Alexandrian school","Jerusalem school","Roman school"]', 'Alexandrian school', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What is the "quadriga" or fourfold sense of Scripture developed in the medieval period?', 'multiple_choice', '["Four Gospel accounts","Literal, allegorical, moral, and anagogical senses","Four major prophets","Four stages of revelation"]', 'Literal, allegorical, moral, and anagogical senses', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Which Reformation principle emphasized Scripture interpreting Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["Sola fide","Sola gratia","Analogia fidei","Sola Scriptura"]', 'Analogia fidei', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What did Luther emphasize regarding the clarity of Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["Perspicuity","Obscurity","Mystery","Complexity"]', 'Perspicuity', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Which church father is associated with the Antiochene school?', 'multiple_choice', '["Origen","Clement","Chrysostom","Augustine"]', 'Chrysostom', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What did the Reformation principle of sola Scriptura affirm?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture plus tradition","Scripture as ultimate authority","Scripture and reason equally","Scripture interpreted by the Pope"]', 'Scripture as ultimate authority', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What did the Enlightenment bring to biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Historical-critical methods","Allegorical methods","Mystical interpretation","Oral tradition"]', 'Historical-critical methods', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'According to Acts 17:11, what did the Bereans do with Paul''s teaching?', 'multiple_choice', '["Rejected it immediately","Accepted it without question","Examined the Scriptures daily","Asked for more miracles"]', 'Examined the Scriptures daily', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Calvin stressed the importance of what in interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Allegorical meaning","Authorial intent and historical context","Church tradition","Personal revelation"]', 'Authorial intent and historical context', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What approach did Thomas Aquinas attempt in medieval interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pure allegory","Pure literalism","Balance literal and spiritual senses","Reject the Old Testament"]', 'Balance literal and spiritual senses', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Describe how the Reformation changed biblical interpretation and why these changes were significant.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());

(750005, 'What is the "quadriga" or fourfold sense of Scripture developed in the medieval period?', 'multiple_choice', '["Four Gospel accounts","Literal, allegorical, moral, and anagogical senses","Four major prophets","Four stages of revelation"]', 'Literal, allegorical, moral, and anagogical senses', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Which Reformation principle emphasized Scripture interpreting Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["Sola fide","Sola gratia","Analogia fidei","Sola Scriptura"]', 'Analogia fidei', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What did Luther emphasize regarding the clarity of Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["Perspicuity","Obscurity","Mystery","Complexity"]', 'Perspicuity', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Which church father is associated with the Antiochene school?', 'multiple_choice', '["Origen","Clement","Chrysostom","Augustine"]', 'Chrysostom', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What did the Reformation principle of sola Scriptura affirm?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture plus tradition","Scripture as ultimate authority","Scripture and reason equally","Scripture interpreted by the Pope"]', 'Scripture as ultimate authority', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What did the Enlightenment bring to biblical interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Historical-critical methods","Allegorical methods","Mystical interpretation","Oral tradition"]', 'Historical-critical methods', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'According to Acts 17:11, what did the Bereans do with Paul''s teaching?', 'multiple_choice', '["Rejected it immediately","Accepted it without question","Examined the Scriptures daily","Asked for more miracles"]', 'Examined the Scriptures daily', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Calvin stressed the importance of what in interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Allegorical meaning","Authorial intent and historical context","Church tradition","Personal revelation"]', 'Authorial intent and historical context', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'What approach did Thomas Aquinas attempt in medieval interpretation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pure allegory","Pure literalism","Balance literal and spiritual senses","Reject the Old Testament"]', 'Balance literal and spiritual senses', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750005, 'Describe how the Reformation changed biblical interpretation and why these changes were significant.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
